creator: neil@darlow.co.uk
text:
Following the latest PythonTwisted update, attempting to start
jabber-pymsn-transport gives the following:

Starting jabber_pymsn.
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/usr/local/lib/jabber/pymsn/PyMSNt.py", line 14, in ?
    main.main()
  File "/usr/local/lib/jabber/pymsn/src/main.py", line 397, in main
    app = App()
  File "/usr/local/lib/jabber/pymsn/src/main.py", line 334, in __init__
    twistd.checkPID(config.pid)
AttributeError: 'module' object has no attribute 'checkPID'
